short_summary: War ongoing, Iran deal shifts US focus
rationale: Active war baseline unchanged; Trump's Iran deal claim is a fresh signal that US diplomatic energy may shift away from Ukraine, adding uncertainty to Western aid continuity.

top_events.title: Trump claims Iran 'great settlement', cancels strikes
top_events.summary: US diplomatic focus pivoting to Iran deal; raises fresh uncertainty about sustained US attention and military aid to Ukraine.

top_events.title: Active war with Russia continues
top_events.summary: No new qualitative escalation reported this cycle; ongoing strikes, infrastructure risk, and mobilization remain daily reality.

top_events.title: Vance says Netanyahu 'has got some things wrong'
top_events.summary: US signaling friction with Israel; part of broader Trump foreign policy recalibration that includes Iran deal — context for Ukraine aid uncertainty.
